name: Velopack
description: Next-gen cross-platform installer and auto-update framework for Windows, macOS, and Linux desktop apps.

seo.title: Velopack — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Velopack: Next-gen cross-platform installer and auto-update framework for Windows, macOS, and Linux desktop apps.

when_to_use: Cross-platform installer and auto-updater for desktop apps
Windows, macOS, and Linux update delivery from one tool
Delta update patches to minimize download bandwidth
In-app update check and install with user confirmation

pros: Fast, small installers with true cross-platform support
Modern design compared to Squirrel and ClickOnce
cons: Some edge-case signing flows still maturing
Migration from Squirrel.Windows not always trivial
review.verdict: The most interesting modern installer/updater for .NET and cross-platform desktop apps right now.
review.best_for: Desktop apps (especially .NET) wanting modern install + auto-update without Electron-builder complexity.
review.not_for: Teams needing the battle-tested track record of Sparkle or electron-builder.
